title: Education, health and care plans: England 2025
body: "This publication provides data on the number of children and young people with an EHC plan in England.  It also provides data on the administration of EHC plans, including:   the number of EHC plans in place in January 2025 the number of EHC plans made for the first time during the 2024 calendar year the number and percentage of EHC plans that were issued within 20 weeks the number of requests for EHC needs assessments the number of EHC needs assessments carried out   It is based on the statutory SEN2 data collection.  "

taxons.title: Special educational needs and disability (SEND) and high needs
